title: pavonia orientalis
intro: Pavonia orientalis is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, known for its vibrant red flowers and traditional medicinal uses. The plant is rich in anthraquinone glycosides and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia orientalis include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Pavonia orientalis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
